prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年四川大学在浙江省综合类最低位次分别为10905→10495→10990→10917→12308名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约1391名，为近五年最大 降幅，基准位次约12308名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年206人、2022年207人、2023年197人、2024年190人、2025年231人；2026年综合类计划17 0人，较2025年大幅缩减61人（-26.4%），缩招幅度显著，竞争压力理论上有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021 年第14→2022年第11→2023年第12→2024年第15→2025年第15→2026年第16名，近年稳定在15名左右，属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负 面」，涉及师德师风、学术不端等51个事件（负面46个），包括教师被硕博生联名举报、投档线暴跌等舆情，对考生报考心理产生一定压制；抖音热度排名第35/106，评价「较热 」，短视频平台有一定关注度；口腔医学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、药学A、数学A、生物学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A、马克思主义理 论A等，A-及以上学科达19个，学科实力雄厚，尤其口腔医学为全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推 荐；新闻传播学明显劝退；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增长37.6%，竞争显著加剧；四川大学位于 四川省成都市，距浙江省较远，属跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划大幅缩减26.4%（缩招使 位次数字减小）、浙江省考生总数暴增37.6%带来的竞争加剧（使位次数字增大）、以及声誉负面舆情对报考意愿的压制（使位次数字增大）；预测2026年最低位次约11558名，区间11058–12058名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Sichuan University in Zhejiang Province comprehensive category were 10905 → 10495 → 10990 → 10917 → 12308, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2025, the ranking dropped by approximately 1391 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, with a baseline ranking of about 12308. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province was 206 in 2021, 207 in 2022, 197 in 2023, 190 in 2024, and 231 in 2025. In 2026, the comprehensive category plan is 170, a significant reduction of 61 students (-26.4%) compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 14th in 2021, 11th in 2022, 12th in 2023, 15th in 2024, 15th in 2025, and 16th in 2026, stabilizing around 15th place in recent years, making it a top national comprehensive university. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving 51 incidents (46 negative) related to teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc., including teachers being jointly reported by graduate students and a sharp drop in admission scores, which suppresses candidates' willingness to apply. On Douyin, it ranks 35th out of 106 in popularity, evaluated as 'relatively hot', with some attention on short video platforms. It has A+ disciplines in Stomatology, Chinese Language and Literature, Nursing; A in Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, Mathematics, Biology, Software Engineering, Light Industry Technology and Engineering, Marxist Theory, etc., with 19 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength, especially Stomatology being top in the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of 37.6% compared to 291,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, relatively far from Zhejiang Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in rankings in 2025, the substantial reduction of 26.4% in enrollment plan for 2026 (which reduces the ranking number), the 37.6% surge in candidate numbers in Zhejiang Province (which increases the ranking number), and the suppression of application willingness due to negative reputation incidents (which increases the ranking number); the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 11558, with a range of 11058 to 12058.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11058–12058, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as targets for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11000), one can aim for top-tier majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 12000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 engineering majors and arrange the application gradient reasonably.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在浙江省医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年8659名（计划30人）、2022年8749名（计划30人）、2023年9564名（计划31人）、2024年14955名（计划38人）、20 25年12852名（计划36人）。2024年因大幅扩招（+22.6%）位次显著下滑至14955，2025年缩招（-5.3%）后位次回升至12852。2026年招生计划进一步缩减至31人（较2025年减少13 .9%），缩招幅度加大，按供需弹性模型计算，位次将继续回升（更难进），基准值为11781名。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家『985工程』、『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校（A类）。其华西医学中心历史悠久、实力雄厚，口腔医学长期位 居全国前列，临床医学、基础医学等学科实力突出，在浙江省考生中享有极高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在浙江省持续保持高报考热度，尤其是口腔医学、临床医学等核心专业竞争激烈。四川大学医学类在浙江招生规模适中（2026年计划31人），虽地处西南，但华西品 牌影响力辐射全国，对浙江考生吸引力不减。2024年扩招后位次大幅下降，2025年缩招后位次回升，反映出招生计划变动对位次的显著影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年四川大学在浙江省医学类最低录取位次约为11731名，较2025年（12852名）有所上升（更难进），主要因招生计划进一步缩减加 剧竞争。波动区间预计在11379至12083名之间，建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical category in Zhejiang Province over the past five years are: 2021: 8659 (planned 30 students), 2022: 8749 (planned 30), 2023: 9564 (planned 31), 2024: 14955 (planned 38), 2025: 12852 (planned 36). In 2024, due to a significant enrollment expansion (+22.6%), the ranking dropped sharply to 14955. In 2025, with a reduction in enrollment (-5.3%), the ranking rebounded to 12852. In 2026, the enrollment plan further decreases to 31 students (a 13.9% reduction from 2025), with a larger reduction magnitude. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the ranking will continue to rise (harder to enter), with a baseline value of 11781.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). Its West China Medical Center has a long history and strong strength, with stomatology consistently ranking among the top in the country, and outstanding strength in clinical medicine, basic medicine, and other disciplines, enjoying a high reputation among Zhejiang Province examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors in Zhejiang Province continue to maintain high application enthusiasm, especially core majors like stomatology and clinical medicine, which are highly competitive. Sichuan University's medical category has a moderate enrollment scale in Zhejiang (planned 31 students in 2026). Although located in the southwest, the West China brand influence radiates nationwide, and its appeal to Zhejiang examinees remains strong. The ranking dropped significantly after the 2024 expansion and rebounded after the 2025 reduction, reflecting the significant impact of enrollment plan changes on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical category in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is approximately 11731, an increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (12852), mainly due to further reduction in enrollment plans intensifying competition. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 11379 and 12083. It is recommended that examinees position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
